channel.title: southernadventures1
channel.description: God First✝️ Custom Treehouse Builder southadvsbiz@gmail.com Full videos on YOUTUBE 👇

item.title: Giving away this system to 3 people. Details at end of video. Go...
item.description:
Giving away this system to 3 people. Details at end of video. Gotta love being bale to run off 5 different power souces. I have a small creek where I could generate some water turbine energy 24/7. Its also always more windy in the winter time here, which could be a perfect supplment for the loss in solar energy in the winter. Many differnet streams of power powering into the same bank would create so much redundancy that there would never be a chance I dont have power.
#treehouse #fyp #diy #homestead
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
